summary: Verified coupon QR + student card QR now encode URL format (<FRONTEND_URL>/scan?c= | ?s=), URL parser works in /api/scan/lookup, backward compatibility with legacy raw + pipe payloads is preserved, startup migration ran successfully, and frontend /scan?c=<code> auto-invokes lookup and renders the ResultCard with verified student info. Found and FIXED one missed change in server.py (student_card() was still emitting legacy pipe QR). After fix, 10/10 backend tests pass and frontend E2E passes.
action_items: None — bug fully fixed. Main agent may want to review the server.py student_card() one-line fix I applied (payload now uses FRONTEND_URL/scan?s=<student_number>).
critical_code_review_comments: Bug in bug-fix: initial commit updated coupon claim + parser + Scan.jsx + startup migration, but forgot to update /api/student-card QR payload — I patched it (server.py L571) to keep the fix consistent across coupon AND student QRs.
_parse_qr_payload is tolerant and robust: handles URL (?c/?s/?p), pipe (SCD|/COUPON|), and raw code/student_number all correctly.
Startup migration only touches active coupons; redeemed/expired coupons keep the legacy QR which is fine (they are historical).
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (student_card QR payload switched to URL format)
test_credentials: admin@savycampusdeals.in / Admin@123; fresh student registered per test run (qrstud_<hex>@example.com / Test@1234)
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run registers + verifies a fresh student via /auth/register + OTP fetched from mongo + /verification/submit (auto-approved), then claims one outlet offer. Test-created students are prefixed 'qrstud_' — cleanup not implemented (test data volume is small).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_qr_url_scan.py — runs in ~3s and covers all QR content-format guarantees. It uses pymongo to fetch OTP when Resend delivered the email (dev_otp only appears on send failure). If pytest.ini forces xdist, remember to override with `-o addopts=` so tests share module-scope state (they mutate a STATE dict in file order).
rca of the issue: Root cause: the original commit updated the *coupon claim* code path (server.py L787) and the URL parser (L920-958) and the startup migration (L1452-1466) and the frontend Scan.jsx (auto-lookup) — but missed the *student card* endpoint which was still generating the legacy `SCD|number|user_id|email` pipe payload. That legacy string is NOT a URL, so scanning it with a phone camera would just display the raw text (exactly the reported symptom, but for student QR). Fix applied: server.py student_card() now generates `{FRONTEND_URL}/scan?s={student_number}` — verified via pyzbar decode of the base64 PNG.
